## Operations

### `approval_rule`

- **`list`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `approver` | `string` | ‚Äî | [add] Name or email of the org member who will approve matching calls. Resolved by exact email or partial full_name match among active org members. Use a full email address when names are ambiguous. |
  | `tool_pattern` | `string` | ‚Äî | [add] Exact tool name to match, or '*' for all tools. Examples: 'block_ip', 'dns_lookup', '*'. Defaults to '*'. |
  | `user_id_pattern` | `string` | ‚Äî | [add] UUID of the user whose calls must be approved, or '*' to match calls from any user in the org. Defaults to '*'. |
  | `priority` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [add] Tie-break priority when multiple rules match with the same specificity score. Higher value wins. Defaults to 0. |
  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | [add] Optional human-readable description of the rule. |
  | `rule_id` | `string` | ‚Äî | [delete] UUID of the approval rule to remove. |

- **`add`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `approver` | `string` | ‚Äî | [add] Name or email of the org member who will approve matching calls. Resolved by exact email or partial full_name match among active org members. Use a full email address when names are ambiguous. |
  | `tool_pattern` | `string` | ‚Äî | [add] Exact tool name to match, or '*' for all tools. Examples: 'block_ip', 'dns_lookup', '*'. Defaults to '*'. |
  | `user_id_pattern` | `string` | ‚Äî | [add] UUID of the user whose calls must be approved, or '*' to match calls from any user in the org. Defaults to '*'. |
  | `priority` | `integer` | ‚Äî | [add] Tie-break priority when multiple rules match with the same specificity score. Higher value wins. Defaults to 0. |
  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | [add] Optional human-readable description of the rule. |
